buildCommand: npm --prefix apps/calendar run build && mkdir -p out/apps/calendar out/apps && cp index.html out/index.html && cp -r apps/calendar/dist/* out/apps/calendar/ && for app_dir in apps/*; do app_name=$(basename "$app_dir"); if [ "$app_name" = "calendar" ] || [ "$app_name" = "calendar_legacy" ]; then continue; fi; if [ -f "$app_dir/index.html" ]; then cp -r "$app_dir" "out/apps/$app_name"; fi; done
